product: Organization name required to enable Delta Sharing on metastore
tagline: When enabling Delta Sharing on your metastore, an organization name must be specified if you are sharing data with a Databricks recipient not in your account.
what_it_does: When enabling Delta Sharing on your metastore, an organization name must be specified if you are sharing data with a Databricks recipient not in your account. When possible, existing provider names without an organization name are automatically updated to include account details, aiming to make them more readable. A readable organization name helps recipients to identify their share providers.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

key_takeaway: When enabling Delta Sharing on your metastore, an organization name must be specified if you are sharing data with a Databricks recipient not in your account.
